pullRequest.title: feat: support fsdp2, add lr scheduler, enhance fsdp ckpt save and load
pullRequest.body:
<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->

### Description
<!--- Describe your changes in detail -->

- Support FSDP2, support hybrid shard strategy
- Add learning rate scheduler, support "constant" and "cosine" scheduler
- Enhance checkpoint save and load for model, optimizer, lr scheduler and random state
- Add grad clip
- Support mixed precision in FSDP training

pullRequest.title: fix: default gloo group due to prismatic import & dep enhancement
pullRequest.body:
<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->

### Description
<!--- Describe your changes in detail -->
The `prismatic` package initializes a `DistributedOverwatch` by default, which initializes `accelerate.PartialState`, which in turn initializes a torch.distributed process group in `GLOO`. This results in default group being `GLOO`, which does not support CUDA tensors and allreduce average. The docker image includes a custom version of `prismatic` and so the problem does not exist. But this custom version is not included in the Dockerfile and the pyproject.toml, causing problems when run with custom environment.

This fix moves the `prismatic` import lazily when used to avoid creating process group before FSDP. This fixes https://github.com/RLinf/RLinf/issues/125.

### Motivation and Context
<!--- Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->
<!--- If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here. -->

### How has this been tested?
<!--- Please describe in detail how you tested your changes. -->
<!--- Include details of your testing environment, tests ran to see how -->
<!--- your change affects other areas of the code, etc. -->

pullRequest.title: feat: unified docker image and dockerfile
pullRequest.body:
<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->

### Description
<!--- Describe your changes in detail -->
This PR unifies the Dockerfile of math reasoning and embodied. This not only simplifies the maintenance of Dockerfiles, but also unifies the three embodied images we have now (openvla, openvla-oft, and pi0) into `rlinf/rlinf:agentic-rlinf0.1-torch2.6.0-openvla-openvlaoft-pi0`.

When using the embodied image, users can switch between the three environments via a simple `switch_env` command like `source switch_env openvla-oft`.

This is still a draft that is being tested, and the docs will be updated later. This is intended to address https://github.com/RLinf/RLinf/issues/126.

### Motivation and Context

pullRequest.title: fix(ckpt_convertor): fix wrong attr setting in ckpt_convertor
pullRequest.body:
<!--- Provide a general summary of your changes in the Title above -->

### Description
Former ckpt_convertor will use yaml's ckpt config in prior, and set a wrong default value when they are not in yaml's ckpt config. This PR use default ckpt_convertor config in prior and will be reset with ckpt config's value when the yaml's ckpt config has corresponding attr.

### How has this been tested?
Tested in single machine.

pullRequest.title: fix: make main_image_key configurable in RealWorldEnv
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
- Replace hardcoded "wrist_1" image key with a configurable `main_image_key` parameter
- Default value is "wrist_1" for backward compatibility
- Users can now specify different image keys for their real-world robot environments

## Test Plan
- [x] Code review: changes are minimal and follow existing code style
- [x] Backward compatible: default value preserves existing behavior

Fixes #530

pullRequest.title: feat: support non-Debian distros in install
pullRequest.body:
## Summary
- Add support for RHEL/CentOS/Fedora/AlmaLinux (dnf/yum) and Arch Linux (pacman) package managers
- Fix package name mappings for non-Debian systems
- Handle curl-minimal conflicts with --allowerasing flag
- Enable EPEL and CRB repositories for RHEL-based systems

## Test Plan
- [x] Tested on AlmaLinux 9 using Docker container
- [x] All 295 packages installed successfully
- [x] Rendering runtime configuration files created correctly

Fixes #604

pullRequest.title: fix(fsdp): make FSDP can be fully offloaded
pullRequest.body:
### Description

Current FSDP offload implement only tries to move every Parameter to cpu, ignore FSDP's existing cached attrs which are all possibly on gpus. More importantly, there are raw param's tensor view hang on flat_param, pointing to former gpu storages and causes these storages can not be released. 

This PR also adds official CPUOffload to FSDP.

### Motivation and Context

Make FSDP able to be fully offloaded.

### How has this been tested?
TODO.
